roa.docketEntryComment: REQ ADD CRIM CAL-MOT TO DECLARE PUBLIC DEFENDER CONFLICT

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/CON:STUART BLUMSTEIN/BWDNC/REIN ORIG TC/OR/PROB EXT:05-11-09/DEF:IS ADMONISHED TO REPORT TO PROBATION/
/CAL:DEFT TO PROVIDE LETTER FROM HOTEL RE VOL WORK/FTA/BW/PROB ADM REV/BWI/BAIL:10000/BWNUM:1ST/
/CAL:DEFT TO PROVIDE LETTER FROM HOTEL RE VOL WORK/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:DEFENDANT'S OWN PROGRESS REPORT ON MENTAL HEALTH COUSELING/CONTD:06-20-06 FOR DEFT TO PROVIDE A LETTER FROM HIS HOTEL RE VOLUNTEER WORK/DOP/
